zh.Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾阿卡斯特 馬爾比斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Malbis於大約1352年出生在英國越可爾阿卡斯特 馬爾比斯時，她的父親Sir John Malbis of Acaster Malbis38歲，母親Maude Acaster24歲。她於大約1369年與Thomas Fairfax III在英國越可爾沃爾頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1385年之後在英國越可爾沃爾頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾阿卡斯特 馬爾比斯。

zh-hans.Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾阿卡斯特 馬爾比斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Malbis于大约1352年出生在英国越可爾阿卡斯特 馬爾比斯时，她的父亲Sir John Malbis of Acaster Malbis38岁，母亲Maude Acaster24岁。她于大约1369年与Thomas Fairfax III在英国越可爾沃爾頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1385年之后在英国越可爾沃爾頓，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾阿卡斯特 馬爾比斯。

nameMeanings.name: Malbis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Mellis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Spiro, Christos, Spero.
Scottish (mainly Aberdeenshire and Morayshire): from an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Maol Íosa ‘devotee of Jesus’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Malbis was born about 1352, in Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir John Malbis of Acaster Malbis, was 38 and her mother, Maude Acaster, was 24. She married Thomas Fairfax III about 1369, in Walton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1385, in Walton, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Malbis est née environ 1352, à Acaster Malbis, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Malbis of Acaster Malbis, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Maude Acaster, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Fairfax III environ 1369, à Walton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1385, à Walton, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Acaster Malbis, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England: Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Malbis um 1352 in Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Malbis of Acaster Malbis 38 und ihre Mutter Maude Acaster 24. Sie hat um 1369 in Walton, Yorkshire, England Thomas Fairfax III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1385 in Walton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Thomas Fairfax III circa 1369, nel Walton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1385, nel Walton, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolta a Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアカスター マルビス
ja.Walton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアワルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Malbisが約1352年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアカスター マルビスで生まれた時，父Sir John Malbis of Acaster Malbisは38歳，母Maude Acasterは24歳であった。約1369年にイギリスヨークシュアイアワルトンでThomas Fairfax IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1385年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアワルトンで死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアカスター マルビスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Malbis(이)가 대략 1352년 영국 요르크실르 악아스터 맬비스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Malbis of Acaster Malbis(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude Acaster(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1369년 영국 요르크실르 월턴에서 Thomas Fairfax III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 이후 영국 요르크실르 월턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 악아스터 맬비스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Malbis nasceu aproximadamente 1352, em Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Malbis of Acaster Malbis, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Maude Acaster, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Fairfax III aproximadamente 1369, em Walton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1385, em Walton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, England: Acaster Malbis, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Malbis родилась около 1352 г. в местности акастир малбис, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Malbis of Acaster Malbis было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude Acaster, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Fairfax III около 1369 г. в местности валтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1385 г. в местности валтон, еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности акастир малбис, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
